'''Gamall Wironicc''' was an individual who found himself stranded on<ref name="CCG" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. A strange wanderer, he was rumored to have sacrificed himself in battle so that his comrades could live on, at some point prior to being stuck on Tatooine. Wironicc missed everything that he would never be.<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Wironicc.jpg|thumb|Umpass-stay's image being used to represent the Gamall Wironicc character]]
The Gamall Wironicc character was created in the [[2001]] ''[[Tatooine Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. His card used the image of [[Umpass-stay/Legends|Umpass-stay]],<ref name="CCG" /> a [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] visible in the [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] scenes of the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="RotJ" /> As a result of that inconsistency, in [[2011]], [[Holocron continuity database]] maintainer [[Leland Chee]] announced that he was planning to [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]] Wironicc as one of several unnamed Klatooinians seen in the background of the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="KotC">{{Facebook|noprofile=1|url=permalink.php?story_fbid=232130050141262&id=793375187#!/permalink.php?story_fbid=231138123573788&id=1152097426|author=Leland Chee|date=2011-07-07|nobackup=1}}</ref> However, that retcon was never implemented before the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] was declared [[Canon|non-canon]].<ref name="EU">{{SW|url=news/the-legendary-star-wars-expanded-universe-turns-a-new-page|text=The Legendary Star Wars Expanded Universe Turns a New Page}}</ref> For this reason, Wironicc's [[Species/Legends|species]] is also considered undetermined.
